name: Codex CLI
project_binding_recipe: Bind the repo and map neutral aliases before starting Codex CLI.
approval_path: Let hasp mcp auto-open the daemon-backed session, then use project/session or window grants; avoid raw value retrieval.
safe_inject_path: Use hasp_run / hasp_inject over stdio for command and file-based secret needs.
write_env_path: Use hasp write-env for explicit convenience materialization only.
